story.iWant: phoneNumber ile kayıt olabilmek (admin için password zorunlu, staff için opsiyonel)
story.soThat: sisteme giriş yapabileyim ve hesap oluşturabileyim
story.tasks: - Task 1: CreateUserDto (RegisterDto) ve UserResDto oluştur (AC: 2, 4, 8) - Task 2: AuthService.register() method implement et (AC: 3, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9) - Task 3: AuthController.register() endpoint oluştur (AC: 1, 8, 9) - Task 4: OTP stub/placeholder oluştur (AC: 7) - Task 5: Password hashing utility kullan (AC: 5) - Task 6: Multi-tenancy (domainID) entegrasyonu (AC: 6) - Task 7: Unit test yaz (AC: All) - Task 8: Integration test yaz (AC: 1, 2, 3, 8, 9)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. AC-2.2.1: POST /auth/register endpoint oluşturulmuş ve çalışıyor 2. AC-2.2.2: RegisterDto validation yapılıyor (phoneNumber unique, E.164, firstName/lastName 2-50 chars, role enum, password optional admin-required, email optional) 3. AC-2.2.3: phoneNumber uniqueness kontrolü yapılıyor → duplicate ise 409 Conflict 4. AC-2.2.4: Password validation (eğer sağlanmışsa): minimum 8 karakter, en az 1 harf ve 1 rakam 5. AC-2.2.5: Password (eğer sağlanmışsa) bcrypt ile hash'lenip saklanıyor (10 rounds) 6. AC-2.2.6: User veritabanına kaydediliyor (phoneVerified: false, isActive: true) 7. AC-2.2.7: SMS OTP gönderiliyor (phone verification için - Epic 5.1 FONIVA integration stub) 8. AC-2.2.8: Response döndürülüyor: User bilgileri (passwordHash exclude edilmiş, UserResDto) 9. AC-2.2.9: Hata durumları doğru handle ediliyor (409 Conflict duplicate phone, 400 Bad Request validation, 500 SMS error)

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Authentication & Session Management (Phone-based)
doc.snippet: RegisterDto validation yapılıyor: phoneNumber (required, unique, E.164 format), firstName/lastName (required, 2-50 chars), role enum (admin/staff/manager), password (required if admin, optional else), email (optional). Phone uniqueness check, password bcrypt hash (10 rounds), SMS OTP via FONIVA (Epic 5.1).

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Authentication & Session Management (Phone-based)
doc.snippet: @IsPhoneNumber('TR'), @IsEnum(['admin','staff','manager']), @Matches(/^(?=.*[A-Za-z])(?=.*\d)/) for password (min 8 chars, 1 letter + 1 number), @IsEmail() for email. UserResDto uses @Exclude() for passwordHash, deletedAt, domainID. plainToInstance() for sanitization.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Authentication & Session Management (Phone-based)
doc.snippet: AuthService.register() checks phone uniqueness (ConflictException if exists), validates admin password requirement (BadRequestException if missing), hashes password with bcrypt (10 rounds), creates user (phoneVerified: false), calls OtpService.generateAndSendOtp() for verification, returns UserResDto (plainToInstance).

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Authentication & Session Management (Phone-based)
doc.snippet: Auth module structure: src/modules/auth/ with dto/ (register.dto.ts, user-res.dto.ts), services/ (otp.service.ts), auth.controller.ts (POST /auth/register), auth.service.ts (register logic), auth.module.ts (providers: AuthService, OtpService).

doc.title: Epic 2: Authentication & Session Management (Phone-based)
doc.snippet: Phone-based registration: phoneNumber unique, admin requires password, staff optional password. CreateUserDto with class-validator (@IsPhoneNumber()), password bcrypt hash (10 rounds), SMS OTP via FONIVA (Epic 5.1). Response: UserResDto (password exclude). Duplicate phone → 409 Conflict.

doc.title: Architecture - Boilerplate
doc.snippet: src/modules/auth/: dto/ (request/response DTOs), services/ (token.service.ts, otp.service.ts), strategies/ (jwt.strategy.ts), decorators/ (@Public(), @CurrentUser()), guards/ (jwt-auth.guard.ts), auth.controller.ts, auth.service.ts, auth.module.ts.

doc.title: Architecture - Boilerplate
doc.snippet: Phone-based JWT + DB Refresh Tokens (hrsync-backend pattern). Phone + Password (Admin), Phone + OTP (Staff). Stateless access token (15-60 min), database-stored refresh token (7-30 days). OTP System: database table + 5 min expiry, FONIVA SMS provider.

doc.title: Boilerplate - Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Phone-based JWT authentication. Admin Authentication: Phone + Password. Staff/Other Roles: Phone + OTP. JWT token generation, access + refresh token pattern, OTP verification (SMS-based only), password reset flow (phone + OTP, admin only), login rate limiting (brute-force protection).

file.reason: Auth module configuration with PassportModule and JwtModule. NEEDS UPDATE: Add AuthService to providers array and exports. Currently exports JwtStrategy, JwtModule, PassportModule.

Currently empty stub. NEEDS IMPLEMENTATION: Add register() method that checks phone uniqueness, validates admin password requirement, hashes password with bcrypt (10 rounds), creates user via PrismaService, calls OtpService, returns UserResDto.

Contains test endpoints (GET /auth/test/public, GET /auth/test/protected). NEEDS ADDITION: POST /auth/register endpoint with @Public() decorator, @Body() RegisterDto, calls AuthService.register(), returns { success, data: UserResDto, message }.
READY TO USE: @Public() decorator for bypassing JWT authentication. Use on POST /auth/register endpoint to allow unauthenticated access.

READY TO USE: Defines JWT payload structure (sub, phoneNumber, domainID, roles, iat, exp). Phone-based authentication already designed. Not directly used in Story 2.2 (no token generation yet), but confirms phone-based approach.
READY TO USE: Global PrismaService extending PrismaClient with lifecycle hooks. Inject into AuthService for user creation (prisma.user.create()), phone uniqueness check (prisma.user.findUnique()).

READY TO USE: User model with id (UUID), domainID (UUID), email (unique), passwordHash (nullable), firstName, lastName, phone (optional), role (default: staff), isActive (default: true), emailVerified, phoneVerified, createdAt, updatedAt, deletedAt. Schema matches Story 2.2 requirements (phoneNumber, passwordHash, role, phoneVerified, domainID).
READY TO USE: JWT authentication guard with @Public() decorator support. Will protect endpoints, but registration endpoint will use @Public() to bypass.
USE AS TEMPLATE: E2E test pattern with beforeAll user creation, afterAll cleanup, supertest for HTTP requests. Follow this pattern for test/auth-registration.e2e-spec.ts.
READY TO USE: Sets NODE_ENV, JWT_SECRET, JWT expirations for e2e tests. Configured for validation schema.
NEEDS UPDATE: Add ValidationPipe globally for class-validator DTO validation. app.useGlobalPipes(new ValidationPipe({ whitelist: true, forbidNonWhitelisted: true })).
READY TO USE: Root module with ConfigModule (global), PrismaModule (global), AuthModule imported. Loads appConfig, databaseConfig, jwtConfig with Joi validation. All required modules present.

package.name: @nestjs/jwt
package.purpose: JWT module (not used in Story 2.2, but installed from 2.1)

package.name: @nestjs/passport
package.purpose: Passport integration (not used in Story 2.2, but installed from 2.1)

package.name: passport-jwt
package.purpose: JWT strategy (not used in Story 2.2, but installed from 2.1)

package.name: @prisma/client
package.purpose: Prisma ORM client for database operations

package.name: class-transformer
package.purpose: REQUIRED: DTO transformation and exclusion (@Exclude, plainToInstance)

story-context.constraints:
**Development Constraints from Architecture and Tech-Spec:**
1. **Phone-based Authentication:** Use phoneNumber as unique identifier (E.164 format: +90XXXXXXXXXX for Turkish). @IsPhoneNumber('TR') decorator for validation.
2. **Role-based Password Requirement:** Admin role REQUIRES password. Staff/manager roles have OPTIONAL password. Validate in AuthService: `if (role === 'admin' && !password) throw BadRequestException`.
3. **Password Security:** Minimum 8 characters, at least 1 letter and 1 number (regex: /^(?=.*[A-Za-z])(?=.*\d)/). Hash with bcrypt, 10 rounds: `bcrypt.hash(password, 10)`.
4. **Multi-tenancy (domainID):** User entity requires domainID (UUID). Get from ConfigService ('DEFAULT_DOMAIN_ID') or use placeholder: '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'.
5. **Phone Verification:** User created with phoneVerified: false. OTP must be sent for verification (Epic 5.1 FONIVA integration - stub for now).
6. **Response Sanitization:** NEVER return passwordHash, deletedAt, or domainID in API response. Use UserResDto with @Exclude() decorators and plainToInstance().
7. **Error Handling:** Duplicate phoneNumber → 409 Conflict ("Phone number already exists"). Invalid phone format → 400 Bad Request (class-validator). Admin without password → 400 Bad Request. SMS error → 500 Internal Server Error.
8. **Module Organization:** DTOs in src/modules/auth/dto/, Services in src/modules/auth/services/, Controller in src/modules/auth/. Follow NestJS best practices.
9. **Testing Requirements:** Unit tests (AuthService with mocked PrismaService, OtpService). E2E tests (POST /auth/register with various scenarios). Follow test/auth-guard.e2e-spec.ts pattern.
10. **Import Pattern:** Use RELATIVE imports (../../database/prisma.service) instead of path aliases (@/...) due to tsconfig moduleResolution: nodenext (established in Story 2.1).
11. **Validation Pipe:** MUST add ValidationPipe globally in main.ts for class-validator to work: `app.useGlobalPipes(new ValidationPipe({ whitelist: true, forbidNonWhitelisted: true }))`.
12. **OTP Integration:** Call OtpService.generateAndSendOtp(userID, phoneNumber) after user creation. Service should LOG OTP for now (development stub). Epic 5.1 will implement FONIVA SMS provider.
story-context.interfaces:
**API Endpoints:**
- POST /auth/register - Method: POST - Path: /auth/register - Decorator: @Public() (no authentication required) - Request Body: RegisterDto { phoneNumber: string (E.164), firstName: string, lastName: string, role: 'admin' | 'staff' | 'manager', password?: string, email?: string } - Response: { success: boolean, data: UserResDto, message: string } - Status Codes: 201 Created (success), 400 Bad Request (validation fail), 409 Conflict (duplicate phone), 500 Internal Server Error (database/SMS error)
**DTOs (To Be Created):**
- RegisterDto (src/modules/auth/dto/register.dto.ts) - phoneNumber: string (@IsPhoneNumber('TR'), @IsNotEmpty) - firstName: string (@IsString, @MinLength(2), @MaxLength(50)) - lastName: string (@IsString, @MinLength(2), @MaxLength(50)) - role: string (@IsEnum(['admin', 'staff', 'manager'])) - password?: string (@IsOptional, @IsString, @MinLength(8), @MaxLength(50), @Matches(/^(?=.*[A-Za-z])(?=.*\d)/, { message: 'Password must contain at least 1 letter and 1 number' })) - email?: string (@IsOptional, @IsEmail)
- UserResDto (src/modules/auth/dto/user-res.dto.ts) - id: string - phoneNumber: string - firstName: string - lastName: string - email?: string - role: string - isActive: boolean - phoneVerified: boolean - createdAt: Date - updatedAt: Date - @Exclude() passwordHash?: string - @Exclude() deletedAt?: Date - @Exclude() domainID: string
**Service Interfaces:**
- AuthService.register(registerDto: RegisterDto): Promise<UserResDto> - Checks phoneNumber uniqueness (PrismaService.user.findUnique) - Validates admin password requirement - Hashes password if provided (bcrypt.hash) - Creates user (PrismaService.user.create) - Calls OtpService.generateAndSendOtp - Returns sanitized UserResDto (plainToInstance)
- OtpService.generateAndSendOtp(userID: string, phoneNumber: string): Promise<void> (To Be Created) - Generates 6-digit OTP (Math.floor(100000 + Math.random() * 900000)) - STUB: Logs OTP to console (development only) - TODO: Epic 5.1 will store OTP in OTPVerification table and send via FONIVA SMS provider
**Prisma Interfaces (Existing):**
- PrismaService.user.findUnique({ where: { phoneNumber: string } }): Promise<User | null> - PrismaService.user.create({ data: { phoneNumber, firstName, lastName, email, role, passwordHash, phoneVerified, isActive, domainID } }): Promise<User>

tests.standards: Jest testing framework (v29.x) configured. Unit tests: src/**/*.spec.ts pattern, mock PrismaService and OtpService using Jest mocks. E2E tests: test/**/*.e2e-spec.ts pattern, use supertest for HTTP requests, create test users in beforeAll, cleanup in afterAll. Test coverage target: 70%+ (unit + integration + e2e). Follow test/auth-guard.e2e-spec.ts pattern for e2e tests: TestingModule with NestApplication, prisma database cleanup, supertest request() calls. ValidationPipe must be enabled in tests for DTO validation to work.
tests.locations: - Unit tests: src/modules/auth/auth.service.spec.ts (create if not exists) - E2E tests: test/auth-registration.e2e-spec.ts (create new) - Test setup: test/jest-e2e-setup.ts (existing, provides env vars) - Test config: test/jest-e2e.json (existing)
tests.ideas:
**Unit Tests (auth.service.spec.ts):** - AC-2.2.2, AC-2.2.8: Test successful admin registration (with password) returns UserResDto without passwordHash - AC-2.2.2, AC-2.2.8: Test successful staff registration (without password) returns UserResDto - AC-2.2.3, AC-2.2.9: Test duplicate phoneNumber throws ConflictException ("Phone number already exists") - AC-2.2.2, AC-2.2.9: Test admin without password throws BadRequestException ("Password is required for admin role") - AC-2.2.5: Test password hashing applied when provided (verify bcrypt.hash called with 10 rounds) - AC-2.2.7: Test OtpService.generateAndSendOtp called after user creation - AC-2.2.6: Test user created with phoneVerified: false, isActive: true
**E2E Tests (auth-registration.e2e-spec.ts):** - AC-2.2.1, AC-2.2.8: POST /auth/register with valid admin data (phone + password) → 201 Created, UserResDto without passwordHash - AC-2.2.1, AC-2.2.8: POST /auth/register with valid staff data (phone, no password) → 201 Created - AC-2.2.3, AC-2.2.9: POST /auth/register with duplicate phone → 409 Conflict - AC-2.2.2, AC-2.2.9: POST /auth/register with invalid phone format → 400 Bad Request (class-validator) - AC-2.2.4, AC-2.2.9: POST /auth/register admin without password → 400 Bad Request - AC-2.2.4, AC-2.2.9: POST /auth/register with weak password (no number) → 400 Bad Request - AC-2.2.8: Verify response excludes passwordHash, deletedAt, domainID fields - AC-2.2.6: Verify database record created with correct fields (phoneVerified: false, isActive: true)
